name: player_air_yards_share_from_plays range year_offset recombines numerator/denominator
description: Air-yards share is a percentage: a range year_offset must pool SUM(player air yards)/SUM(team air yards) across the window and scale by 100 (ROUND(100.0 * num/den, 2)) to match the season render, not SUM the per-season share percentages. The is_percentage flag drives the x100 scaling in the correlated subquery (mirrors player_target_share_from_plays).
expected_query: with "t3ce95d59aaf33d6fa5588e6fa74dae89" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) as air_yds_share_from_plays_numerator, SUM(nfl_plays.dot) as air_yds_share_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."nfl_team" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) and "pg"."season_year" in (2023) group by "pg"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(t3ce95d59aaf33d6fa5588e6fa74dae89.air_yds_share_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(t3ce95d59aaf33d6fa5588e6fa74dae89.air_yds_share_from_plays_denominator), 0), 2) FROM t3ce95d59aaf33d6fa5588e6fa74dae89 WHERE t3ce95d59aaf33d6fa5588e6fa74dae89.pid = player.pid) AS "air_yds_share_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
